requirements.title: Important: Your payment confirmation MUST include:
requirements.confirmationCodeDesc: The unique transaction code from Zelle

receiptType.title: Required Receipt Type
receiptType.description: To ensure quick and accurate verification, please make sure to submit the correct receipt:

correct.title: Correct Receipt
correct.description: Submit a screenshot of the confirmation receipt that appears immediately after completing the payment in the Zelle app. This is the instant confirmation generated by the app.

incorrect.title: Not Accepted
incorrect.description: Do not submit the PDF receipt that is made available later by the app. Only the immediate app screenshot is accepted for verification.

steps.title: Complete these steps:
steps.step1: Complete your Zelle transfer of the required amount
steps.step2: Save the payment confirmation screenshot that shows all required information

step2Important.title: Important:
step2Important.description: Submit a screenshot of the confirmation receipt that appears immediately after completing the payment in the Zelle app. This is the instant confirmation generated by the app. Do not submit the PDF receipt that is made available later by the app.

steps.step4: Wait for processing (may take up to 48 hours)
